---
title: "Daily Lections for Every Morning and Evening throughout the Year"
---

## Daily Lections for Every Morning and Evening throughout the Year

**Author:** The Rev. J. F. W. Bullock
**Date:** 1902
**Imprint:** London: Rivington

### Notes

In 1902 Bullock published the first three volumes of a projected six volume work called <i>Daily Lections for every Morning and Evening throughout the Year</i> (London: Rivington 1902).  Volume V of this work, described in his preface, was to have consisted of \'Lections on Anglican Worthies, arranged as additional Readings for Sunday\'.  CMY contributed several of these \'Biographies of Eminent Anglicans\', which exist in MS and are catalogued under that name among the Bullock papers in the Bodleian Library, Oxford, but were never published, since no more of the <i>Daily Lections</i> ever appeared.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
